details: Section 4.1.14 in IJMS 27052306 reports 1f as beige solid m.p. 189-190 °C; matches.
Section 4.1.21 in IJMS 27052306 reports 2b as white solid m.p. 102-105 °C; matches.
Compound 1a in Molecules 31050862 reported as white crystals m.p. 112-115 °C (iPrOH); matches.
Compound 3f in Molecules 31050862 reported as orange crystals m.p. 166-169 °C (iPrOH); matches.
Compound (S)-4 in Molecules 31040599 reported m.p. 177-179 °C (decomposition); matches with property=decomposition.
Compound 5a in Molecules 31040599 has m.p. 92-84 °C (paper records range inverted); value_celsius=88 is midpoint.
Compound 4e in Molecules 80100186 has m.p. 135-139 °C; matches.
Compound 4j in Molecules 80100186 has m.p. 139-141 °C; matches.
Compound 4k in Molecules 80100186 has m.p. 97-99 °C; matches.
Compound 2r in Molecules 70800681 has M.p. 177-179 °C; matches.
Table 1 row 19 (disubstituted phthalazine-1,4-dione butane-bridged) in Molecules 2001 reports m.p. 241-243 °C; matches.
Compound 7d hydrochloride in Molecules 2001 has m.p. 192-195 °C; compound name matches paper.
Compound 8c hydrochloride in Molecules 2001 has m.p. 179-183 °C; compound name matches.
Compound anti-2d (triphenylphosphonium salt from PPh3 reaction) in Molecules 7(2) reports 187-188 °C; matches.
Compound 8 (3-amino-3,4-dihydro-4-imino-6-phenylamino[t]hieno[3,2-d]pyrimidin-7-carbonitrile) in Molecules 7(10) has m.p. 185 °C; matches.
Compound 15 in Molecules 7(10) reports m.p. 215 °C; matches but paper says 'in the form of white needles' not 'as white needles'.
Compound 2 (3beta-methoxy-cholest-5-ene) in Molecules 6(4) has m.p. 81-82 C; matches.
Compound 8b in ACS Omega 6c01037 (Section 2.3.7) is slightly yellow crystals, mp 90-92 °C; matches.
Compound 12d in RSC Adv d5ra09311b (Section 4.1.4) Cream solid; MP = 239-241 °C; matches.
Compound 12m in RSC Adv d5ra09311b (Section 4.1.13) Brown solid; MP = 286-288 °C; matches.
Compound 17d in Molecules 31040595 reports white solid mp 100-102 °C; matches.
Compound 9b in PMC12986497 (Section 4.4) Dark yellow powder MP > 300 °C; matches.
Trisulfur lipoic acid (TR-LA) in PMC12985495 has mp 56.9-57.8 °C; matches.
Compound 10h in PMC11844072 reports white precipitate mp 195-197 °C; matches.
Compound 10l in PMC11844072 reports white precipitate mp 151-153 °C; matches.
